description_long: This is a tall, elegant porcelain vase with a flared mouth and a bulbous midsection, decorated in classic blue and white underglaze. The surface features intricate hand-painted scenes of figures in traditional Chinese attire, set within garden and architectural motifs. The upper and lower sections are adorned with detailed floral and landscape patterns, while the rim and base are bordered with geometric designs. The artwork is rendered in varying shades of cobalt blue, creating a striking contrast against the white ceramic background. The vase has a glossy, smooth finish, indicative of high-quality glazing. Its refined craftsmanship and decorative motifs suggest it is both ornamental and functional, suitable for display in prestigious urban settings.
description: A tall, blue-and-white porcelain vase with flared mouth, bulbous midsection, and intricate hand-painted scenes of figures and floral motifs. The surface is glossy and highly detailed, exuding elegance and traditional craftsmanship.
description_view_0: This view highlights a scene with several figures in traditional attire, standing on a patterned floor, with floral motifs below.
description_view_1: This side shows a different group of figures, some seated and some standing, with more visible architectural elements and a continuation of the floral band.
description_view_2: This angle focuses on large, stylized floral and leaf motifs, with less emphasis on human figures and more on natural elements.
description_view_3: This view presents another group of figures interacting, with a prominent tree and garden elements in the background.
